response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and experience with distributed systems, but lacks direct evidence of deep C++ expertise (8+ years) or extensive technical leadership in cloud compute platforms. His background in mentoring, open-source contributions, and diverse tech stacks is valuable, but the role's core requirements (C++, large-scale infrastructure leadership) are not fully met.
strengths: Extensive experience with distributed systems and large-scale infrastructure (e.g., Sociomantic, GISCollective).
Proven mentorship and knowledge-sharing (workshops, talks, open-source projects).
Diverse technical background with exposure to cloud technologies (AWS, Kubernetes) and DevOps practices.
concerns: Only limited C++ experience (primarily at National Instruments, 2014–2015), far below the 8-year requirement.
No explicit technical leadership in cloud compute platforms (preferred qualification).
Most recent roles focus on full-stack development (TypeScript/Node.js) rather than low-level systems or hardware architecture.
